Projects

Work I've built, documented with objective, tools, process, and impact.

Unified Team Intranet

Centralised Google Workspace intranet for a 100+ person student organisation, replacing 6 siloed team drives. Audited all existing folders across 6 Drives, designed a unified Google Sites hub with forms, polls, and a knowledge base — strong positive feedback from the team.

Google Sites Google Drive Google Forms Google Workspace
